Pardon me, but you haven't happened to see my brother around, have you?$3#$b#He's been departing quite early these mornings, and I have reasonable suspicion to assume he was headed in the general direction you have arrived from."/question null "Do you know where Emmet is?#We can go back and check if you want.#Right this way."/emote AdoptableJoltikIngo 60/speak AdoptableJoltikIngo "Ah, bravo! Thank you for your assistance! Very well, lead the way!$12"/fade/viewport -1000 -1000/changeLocation Backwoods/warp AdoptableJoltikEmmet 20 19/warp SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 19 19/warp AdoptableJoltikGalvantula 16 19/showFrame AdoptableJoltikEmmet 40/warp AdoptableJoltikIngo -32 15/warp farmer -33 15/fade/viewport 19 20/pause 1000/playSound SpringBirds/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 20/playSound SpringBirds/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak squeak* (Living with- mhmp- @- nomn- is the best! I get to eat so many devices and more! Yum!)$1"/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Good for you... Good for you..."/speak AdoptableJoltikGalvantula "Don't talk with your mouth full, sweetie.$2"/warp AdoptableJoltikIngo 29 15/warp farmer 28 15/move farmer -9 0 2 true/speed AdoptableJoltikIngo 6/advancedMove AdoptableJoltikIngo false -9 0 0 2 2 100/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "EMMET!!!!!!!!!"/jump AdoptableJoltikEmmet 3/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 16/showFrame AdoptableJoltikEmmet 8/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikEmmet 0/emote AdoptableJoltikEmmet 28/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Ingo..."/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikGalvantula 0/speak AdoptableJoltikIngo "Emmet! What are you doing stationed here at this hour?! You're late to our morning safety checks!$11#$b#While I do appreciate you waking early so as to not derail our daily schedule, we still have much work to accomplish at the station!$19"/emote AdoptableJoltikEmmet 28/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikEmmet "I... just... wanted to... check."/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 20 true/move SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 0 -3 0 true/playSound SpringBirds/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak!* (@! You're back! Yay yay yay!)"/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "A-ah..."/speak AdoptableJoltikIngo "Emmet... I fear that you are becoming sidetracked with your excursions... You know very well that you can trust @! Rest assured, your little passenger is in good hands.$18"/showFrame AdoptableJoltikEmmet 17/shake AdoptableJoltikEmmet 3000/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Ingo. That's the problem. I know that. Too well. They are happy. They moved on. Without me.$7"/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "Emmet..."/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikGalvantula 1/move SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 0 4 0/move farmer 0 4 1 true/showFrame AdoptableJoltikEmmet 12/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikEmmet 3/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "I am Emmet. I am sorry. You weren't supposed to see me. Like this. I have been meeting with Joltik in secret. For weeks.$8"/question null "I'm sorry...#Don't you trust me? Why were you sneaking around my farm?#You know you can just visit, right? You didn't have to hide in the bushes or anything."/shake AdoptableJoltikIngo 2500/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "WHAT?! EMMET! YOU SHOULDN'T DO SUCH THINGS!"/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Oh. You noticed.$8"/emote AdoptableJoltikIngo 36 true/emote farmer 40 true/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "I know you can be trusted. I don't want you to think otherwise. You didn't do anything wrong. That's why. You shouldn't have to worry. They are happier with you.$3#$b#But... It's not the same. I can't help but feel that I... I...$7"/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "Emmet, you're allowing a Joltik to overrun you with jealousy..."/move SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik -2 0 0/pause 900/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikEmmet "It should be me."/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikEmmet 0/pause 1400/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "You have plenty back at home station!"/playSound SpringBirds/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak* (Mama and Emmet missed us! They've been feeding me batteries when you're gone. They say I don't need more. But they say that while they feed me more.)#$b#*Squeak!* (It makes me really happy! @ loves me. Mama loves me. Emmet loves me. I am so full of battery. Yum.)"/emote farmer 40/question null "...#I think they're happiest with both of us taking care of them. You can visit all you want.#That doesn't mean you can't check up on us anymore. They're still happy to see you!"/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikEmmet 3/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Is that true...?"/pause 2500/faceDirection SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 1/emote farmer 32 true/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 20/textAboveHead AdoptableJoltikIngo "AHEM!"/speak AdoptableJoltikIngo "Pardon me for my intrusion, but we are quite far behind schedule!$18#$b#Seeing as how we have resolved this turbulence on our tracks, we must now make our way back to the station!#$b#Emmet, if you have anything you would like to add, please do so post-haste!$12"/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "I am Emmet. This is not the end. I will show up here again. Yup. I am going to keep visiting you and Joltik.#$b#I won't hide anymore. Yup. I am Emmet. I will let myself be clingy and overbearing. Nothing will split our tracks. I know that now. Thank you, @.$6"/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 32 true/pause 1000/globalFade/viewport 1000 1000/stopMusic/end

Entries.CP.SubmasPetDemo.PetJoltikAdopt/w sunny/: movieTheater/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 AdoptableJoltikEmmet 65 16 0 SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 65 16 0/skippable/changeName AdoptableJoltikEmmet Emmet/addTemporaryActor AdoptableJoltikGalvantula 33 26 63 18 0 false Character/move SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik -1 0 0 true/pause 1000/viewport 64 15/playSound SpringBirds/jump SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak squeak!* (@!!! Hiiiii hiiiiiiii!!! I have arrived! I'm yours now!)$5"/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 20/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Hello, @. Joltik likes you verrrrry much. They want to stay with you. You will adopt them. Yup.#$b#You got Galvantula's approval. I filled out the paperwork. The Joltiks are all legally documented now. Don't worry about it.$6"/faceDirection AdoptableJoltikEmmet 3/faceDirection SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 1/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "But you should still get a license at Marnie's station. I cannot file that part for you. Joltik knows to hide just in case. They're verrrry good at it.$8"/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 16/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak* (But don't make me wait too long. Okay? I want to play with you! More than hide 'n seek!)$3"/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Do not let our little Joltik be taken away by the Ferngill Republic's Department of Agriculture. Or make them sad.$11#$b#I am going to give you the necessary materials to get a Pokémon handling permit. You best conduct that procedure. I'm trusting you.$16"/emote farmer 28 true/money 1000000/message "You received $1000000 from Emmet."/speak AdoptableJoltikEmmet "Now departing. Take verrrry good care of our little Joltik! You have to. I will make sure of that. I will see you later...$10"/emote AdoptableJoltikEmmet 28 true/faceDirection SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 0/speak SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik "*Squeak squeak* (Bye, mama!!! Bye, Emmet!! I'll miss you, too! @! Let's visit him and mama a lot together! So they don't get too lonely!)$1"/playSound SpringBirds/jump SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik/emote SubmasDemoAdoptableJoltik 20/emote AdoptableJoltikEmmet 40/pause 1000/globalFade/viewport 1000 1000/stopMusic/end
